actions.title: CommBank Business 3231 — top up for rescheduled $1,941.15 ZEROBI PAY AT transfer (NSF 27 May, retry 28 May)
actions.detail: CommBank notified 1st attempt NSF. NetBank rescheduled to next business day. Ensure cleared funds ≥$1,941.15 in Business Transaction 3231 before retry.

actions.title: Microsoft 365 Business Premium — recurring billing OFF, confirm renewal intent
actions.detail: Email received 26 May: recurring billing turned OFF. Subscription will expire without renewal. Check Microsoft Admin Center and decide: re-enable auto-renewal or cancel intentionally.
